```bash
echo "=== Files in branches but NOT on master ==="

echo "MISSING_LIST=$tmpdir/missing.txt"
```

| --- | --- | --- |
| `chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-22_3` | `src/routes/$locale/_app.tsx` (commit `a45a3f25 feat(app): hide header and footer on game routes`) | Superseded by [#189](https://github.com/leocaseiro/base-skill/pull/189) — drop |
| `chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-23` | `public/audio/phonemes.{json,mp3}` + `phonemes__BKP.*` (commit `7a653220 feat(phonemes): upload Leo voice`) | Already on master via [#180](https://github.com/leocaseiro/base-skill/pull/180) — drop |
| `chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-28_1` | `.gitignore` (incidentally bundled into commit `0054b65e ai(specstory): sync`) | **Worth a look** — see below |

The `.gitignore` diff vs current master:

```diff
-.mcp.local.json          # removed — likely a mistake; CLAUDE.md says this MUST stay ignored
 .specstory/statistics.json
 .superpowers/
 .local-debug/
+*.code-workspace         # added — useful (VSCode workspace files)
+.claude/settings.local.json   # added — useful (per-machine Claude settings)
```

The two additions look useful, but the removal of `.mcp.local.json` contradicts CLAUDE.md ("Extras that depend on a local service live in `.mcp.local.json` (gitignored)"). My recommendation: add the two new lines, **keep** `.mcp.local.json` ignored. Cheap follow-up PR.

1. Open a tiny PR adding just `*.code-workspace` and `.claude/settings.local.json` to `.gitignore`, then proceed with branch cleanup?

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-04-28 01:14:07Z)**_

Run from the repo root (`/Users/leocaseiro/Sites/base-skill`). Two snags I'll surface first:

1. The **main repo checkout itself** is on `chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-28_1`. Switch it to `master` before deleting that branch.
2. There's a worktree on `specstory-sync-2026-04-16` that needs removing first.

```bash
cd /Users/leocaseiro/Sites/base-skill

# 0. Close the two stale PRs
for n in 191 148; do
  gh pr close $n --comment "Superseded by #192 — transcripts already consolidated on master."
done

# 1. Move the main checkout off chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-28_1
git checkout master && git pull --ff-only

# 2. Tear down worktrees we no longer need
git worktree remove worktrees/specstory-sync-2026-04-16
git worktree remove worktrees/chore-specstory-merge-all
git worktree remove worktrees/chore-gitignore-claude-local   # only AFTER #193 merges
git worktree prune

# 3. Delete local branches
LOCAL_BRANCHES=(
  chore/specstory-statistics-remove-from-git
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-17
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-19
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-21
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-21_2
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-22
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-22_2
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-22_3
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-22_4
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-23
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-24
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-28_1
  specstory-sync-2026-04-16
)
git branch -D "${LOCAL_BRANCHES[@]}"

# 4. Delete remote branches (only the ones that exist on origin)
REMOTE_BRANCHES=(
  chore/specstory-statistics-remove-from-git
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-17
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-21
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-22
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-22_2
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-22_4
  chore/specstory-sync-2026-04-28_1
)
git push origin --delete "${REMOTE_BRANCHES[@]}"

# 5. Final tidy
git fetch --prune
git worktree list
git branch --list 'chore/specstory-*' 'specstory-*'   # should be empty
```

Notes:
- I used `-D` (force) for local deletes because several branches have commits that won't be detected as merged (their content was reapplied as a new commit in #192, not the original SHAs).
- The remote list is shorter — only those actually on `origin` per the earlier `git branch -r` check. The rest are local-only.
